positive: A stylized, highly contrasting illustration featuring a silhouette arrangement of diverse flora and fauna (e.g., hummingbirds, stylized ferns, geometric flowers) organized in a symmetrical, cascading vertical pattern. The aesthetic should be modern nature-whimsy, utilizing limited color palette (deep emerald green, burnt orange, and cream) against a clean white background. The lines must be crisp and graphic, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Use strong outlines, clean negative space, and a mandala-like central focus. Minimalist tropical geometry, detailed linework, vector graphic style, central composition, high contrast, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, messy, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, cartoonish, photorealism, grunge, gradients
